Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 145 

LINE_PRCDR_CD 

LABEL: Line Procedure Code 

DESCRIPTION: A field to capture the CPT or HCPCS code that describes a service or good rendered by the provider to 
an enrollee on the specified date of service. 

SHORT NAME: LINE_PRCDR_CD 

LONG NAME: LINE_PRCDR_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT line 

VALUES:
